scripts.dev: export NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0205; paraglide-js compile --project ./project.inlang --outdir ./src/lib/paraglide --strategy url cookie baseLocale --emit-ts-declarations --silent && vite dev
scripts.build: export NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0205; paraglide-js compile --project ./project.inlang --outdir ./src/lib/paraglide --strategy url cookie baseLocale --emit-ts-declarations --silent && vite build
scripts.check: export NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0205; paraglide-js compile --project ./project.inlang --outdir ./src/lib/paraglide --strategy url cookie baseLocale --emit-ts-declarations --silent && svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json
scripts.check:watch: export NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0205; paraglide-js compile --project ./project.inlang --outdir ./src/lib/paraglide --strategy url cookie baseLocale --emit-ts-declarations --silent && svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json --watch
